payload.description:
Gherkin specs:

Scenario: Sending a steering note from a running procedure chat
Given an operator is viewing a procedure conversation
When they type a chat message in procedure-steering mode
Then the message is saved as role USER, humanInteraction CHAT, messageType MESSAGE, responseStatus COMPLETED
And no console dispatch worker or pending assistant response is triggered.

Scenario: All future agents consume steering once
Given a procedure has multiple future LLM-backed agents
When a new steering note exists
Then each agent receives it before its next unstarted LLM call
And each agent records a per-agent watermark so the note is not duplicated.

Scenario: Summary and report agents receive steering
Given report, summary, diagnostic, planner, editor, or reviewer agents run after steering is sent
When they invoke the LLM
Then the steering note appears in their context as advisory mid-run operator guidance.

Scenario: Steering retrieval is scoped
Given chat sessions contain console messages, assistant messages, and procedure steering messages
When runtime asks for procedure steering
Then only completed user-authored procedure-steering messages for the procedure are returned, sorted by creation time with a watermark.
payload.title: Operators can steer running procedures from procedure chat
